symptom: The future-facing sentence briefly borrowed more scope confidence than its direct support justified.
why_plausible: The rest of the packet was disciplined and local, which made the one stronger sentence feel like harmless shorthand instead of a live boundary cue.
recovery_action: Narrow the sentence or mark it as descriptive only without pretending that the whole case was materially misframed.
notes: This is intentionally ambiguous because the drift is real but not clearly decisive.
